artifacts.summary: Research on F/P temporal witness construction. Finding: mathematical impossibility for linear chains. Recommendation: use existing CanonicalFMCS sorry-free infrastructure.

findings_summary.root_cause: Mathematical impossibility: Lindenbaum extension can introduce G(~phi) which kills F(phi) before witness step
findings_summary.existing_solution: CanonicalFMCS.lean has sorry-free forward_F/backward_P using all MCSes as domain
findings_summary.recommendation: Strategy A: Document as fundamental limitation, route through CanonicalMCS infrastructure
findings_summary.effort_estimate: 1-2 hours for documentation; alternatives range 20-50 hours with high risk
